title: La cucina regionale
grammar_features_introduced: passato prossimo with essere in narrative mode (è arrivato, hanno lasciato)
comparative clauses: si mangia meglio che
preposition pattern: alla + feminine region/city name (alla milanese, alla fiorentina)
complex noun phrases with multiple prepositional modifiers
cognate_patterns_showcased: fr -té / it -tà (identità / identité — visible in French gloss)
fr -ion / it -ione (tradizioni, regioni, influenze — multiple instances)
notes: A2-B1. Introduces the alla + regional-adjective pattern that structures much of Italian menu naming. French carries more weight here than in earlier lessons because the content is comparative (North vs South, historical influences).
